ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_relations" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the diagnosis relationship entry */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score representing the strength of the relationship between conditions */,
  "double_events" TEXT /* Description of the dual diagnoses involved */,
  "frequency_arms" INTEGER /* Frequency count of the events (arms) related to the diagnoses */,
  "target_outcome" TEXT /* Target outcome associated with the dual diagnoses (e.g., death) */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., undirected) */,
  "diagnosis_id_1" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the first diagnosis in the dual diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_id_2" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the second diagnosis in the dual diagnosis */,
  "patient_count" INTEGER /* Number of patients diagnosed with the dual conditions */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period for the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection period for the relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the study or analysis that generated this relationship */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., hospital, clinic, EHR system) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code for the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_diagnoses" (
  "patient_diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient-diagnosis relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)
